title: The Straw Hats Meet Elbaf’s Danger
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #3, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Luffy as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If you were all to simply dis- appear!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In exchange for a certain portion of your life- span...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In ex- change of all that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What did you just do, huh?! That didn't even hurt!! ]}

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, you there! You mentioned rocks earli- er. Didn't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now it's even smaller!! I can't fight like this!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
